title: Email Marketing
description: Revolut is looking for Email Marketing to help team manage and execute email campaigns.
fullDescription:
We are seeking an experienced Email Marketing Specialist to join our dynamic marketing team. In this role, you will be responsible for developing and executing email marketing campaigns that drive engagement and conversions.

You will work closely with our content, design, and analytics teams to create compelling email campaigns that resonate with our audience. The ideal candidate has a strong understanding of email marketing best practices, segmentation strategies, and A/B testing methodologies.
responsibilities: Develop and execute email marketing campaigns
Manage email list segmentation and targeting
Analyze campaign performance and optimize for better results
Collaborate with design team on email templates
Conduct A/B testing to improve open and click rates
Ensure compliance with email marketing regulations
requirements: 3+ years of experience in email marketing
Proficiency with email marketing platforms (Mailchimp, SendGrid, etc.)
Strong analytical skills and data-driven mindset
Experience with HTML/CSS for email templates is a plus
Bachelor's degree in Marketing or related field

title: Brand Designer
description: Dropbox is looking for Brand Designer to help the team create visual identity.
fullDescription:
Join our creative team as a Brand Designer where you'll shape the visual identity of Dropbox. You'll work on everything from marketing campaigns to product design, ensuring brand consistency across all touchpoints.

This role requires a strong portfolio demonstrating expertise in brand design, typography, and visual storytelling. You'll collaborate with cross-functional teams to bring our brand to life.
responsibilities: Design brand assets for marketing campaigns
Create visual concepts for product launches
Collaborate with product and marketing teams
Ensure brand consistency across all channels
requirements: Expert knowledge of Adobe Creative Suite
Understanding of design systems and brand guidelines
Bachelor's degree in Design or related field

title: Email Marketing
description: Pitch is looking for Customer Manager to join marketing team.
fullDescription:
We're looking for a Customer Manager to join our marketing team in Berlin. You'll be responsible for managing customer relationships, driving engagement, and ensuring customer success.

This role combines marketing expertise with customer success skills to create meaningful connections with our users.
responsibilities: Coordinate with product team on customer needs
requirements: 3+ years in customer success or marketing
Fluent in English, German is a plus

title: Visual Designer
description: Blinkist is looking for Visual Designer to help team design user interfaces.
fullDescription:
Join Blinkist as a Visual Designer and help us create beautiful, intuitive user interfaces. You'll work on our mobile and web applications, designing experiences that make learning accessible and enjoyable.

We're looking for someone with a keen eye for detail and a passion for creating user-centered designs.
responsibilities: Design user interfaces for mobile and web
Create visual design systems and components
Collaborate with UX designers and developers
requirements: Strong portfolio of UI design work
Proficiency in Figma and design tools
Knowledge of iOS and Android design guidelines
Bachelor's degree in Design or equivalent

title: Product Designer
description: ClassPass is looking for Product Designer to help us design new features.
fullDescription:
We're seeking a Product Designer to join our team and help shape the future of fitness technology. You'll work on designing new features and improving existing ones, always keeping the user at the center of your decisions.

This role requires both strategic thinking and hands-on design skills.
responsibilities: Conduct user research and usability testing
Create wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity designs
Collaborate with product managers and engineers
requirements: Proficiency in Figma and prototyping tools
Bachelor's degree in Design or related field

title: Lead Engineer
description: Canva is looking for Lead Engineer to help develop new features.
fullDescription:
Lead our engineering team in building scalable, high-performance features for millions of users. As a Lead Engineer, you'll combine technical expertise with leadership skills to drive projects from conception to deployment.

You'll mentor junior engineers, make architectural decisions, and ensure code quality across the team.
responsibilities: Lead engineering team and mentor developers
Review code and ensure best practices
Collaborate with product and design teams
requirements: Strong knowledge of modern web technologies
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or equivalent

title: Brand Strategist
description: GoDaddy is looking for Brand Strategist to join the team.
fullDescription:
Shape the future of GoDaddy's brand as a Brand Strategist. You'll develop brand strategies, positioning, and messaging that resonate with our target audience and differentiate us in the market.

This role requires strategic thinking, creativity, and a deep understanding of brand building.
responsibilities: Collaborate with creative and marketing teams
Measure and report on brand performance
requirements: 5+ years in brand strategy or marketing
Experience with market research and analysis
Bachelor's degree in Marketing or Business

title: Data Analyst
description: Twitter is looking for Data Analyst to help team design analytics.
fullDescription:
Join Twitter's data team as a Data Analyst where you'll turn data into actionable insights. You'll work with large datasets, create dashboards, and help drive data-informed decisions across the organization.

This role requires strong analytical skills and the ability to communicate complex findings to non-technical stakeholders.
responsibilities: Analyze large datasets to identify trends and insights
requirements: Proficiency in SQL and data visualization tools
